specific_question: How many paint finish defects per vehicle were recorded during Elexion Automotive's final quality checks in September 2024?
answer: During the September 2024 final quality checks, Elexion Automotive recorded an average of 2.3 paint finish defects per vehicle that included clear coat imperfections, color matching variations, and surface contamination.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's quality assurance testing protocols prioritize Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity performance by Q4 2025 for 2026 EV models to differentiate from competitors and attract 50% of Apple users and 42% of Samsung users who depend on smartphone connections every drive?
